message:
fix: enable signal interception for TUI terminal session

Set intercept_signals: true in TtySessionOptions so the dashboard
properly handles SIGINT, SIGTERM, and SIGWINCH instead of relying on
default signal disposition. This prevents abrupt termination from
leaving the terminal in alternate-screen mode and enables graceful
shutdown and resize handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
